narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 5-A (precinct in Muskingum County) has 877 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
